title: Potion-Warning
description: A action bar text which tell you when and what potion runs out with a sound effect
body:
# What this mod does:
This Mods Add a action bar text when a potion effect is removed and has a sound effect.

# **What configeration does this mod offer:**
**KeyBinds:**
- Turn on/off the mode default up arrow
- Turn on/off blacklist potion effect down arrow this allows you to stop a certain effect for sending you notifications
- You can change these keybinds in options > controls > keybinds and then scroll down

## **Commands:**
- Anything you type that starts with a !potion will send you all available commands for potions

## **Available commands:**

- !potion add {id} | add a blacklisted potion effect
- !potion remove {id} | remove a blacklisted potion effect
- !potion list | list all blacklisted potion effects
- Notes: you have to type in the full name of the potion effect and caps dont matter. I'm not a artist btw.

# Updates
**I will add the lasted release compatibility as soon as possible as i made this mod for myself**

**If you want this for any version of 1.21.xx suggest it in the discord**
